Hey! 👋 I have these skills available:

| Skill | Id | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| **7-phase TDD** | `7-phase` | Disciplined RED→GREEN→REFACTOR cycle across a small feature slice |
| **claude-to-lyra** | `claude-to-lyra` | Delegate to another LLM session over HTTP (switch providers, sandboxed shell, etc.) |
| **edit** | `edit` | Apply the smallest diff to make a failing test pass |
| **goal-driven-execution** | `goal-driven-execution` | Every tool call must advance acceptance tests; stop & replan otherwise |
| **injection-triage** | `injection-triage` | Detect & respond to prompt-injection attempts in tool output / file content |
| **localize** | `localize` | Find the smallest set of files/symbols relevant to a task before editing |
| **reproduce** | `reproduce` | Turn a vague bug report into a minimal, deterministic repro script |
| **review** | `review` | Critique an agent's change before ship — catch quality & safety issues |
| **secrets-triage** | `secrets-triage` | Recognise credentials during read/write so they don't leak |
| **simplicity-first** | `simplicity-first` | Prefer the simplest thing; add complexity only when a test demands it |
| **surgical-changes** | `surgical-changes` | Touch only what the task demands; leave unrelated code alone |
| **test-gen** | `test-gen` | Produce a failing test that captures the user's acceptance criterion |
| **think-before-coding** | `think-before-coding` | One-sentence problem → two-sentence approach → then code |

I'm currently in **EDIT_AUTOMATICALLY** mode, so any code I write lands without per-write confirmation (but I'll show you the diff clearly).
